testcase.name: test_recommendations_no_pii

failure.message: AssertionError: phone leaked in payload: keys=['id', 'user_id', 'name', 'phone', 'category', 'skills', 'experience_years', 'daily_wage', 'hourly_wage', 'languages', 'city', 'bio', 'profile_pic', 'cover_pic', 'available', 'rating', 'jobs_completed', 'review_count', 'verified', 'status', 'last_active', 'distance_km', 'created_at'] assert 'phone' not in {'id': '471b0cc4-b3ed-4592-8aa7-3cb90387d25e', 'user_id': None, 'name': 'Naveen I.', 'phone': '+919871070189', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_security_fixes.py:138: in test_recommendations_no_pii self._assert_no_pii(w) backend/tests/test_security_fixes.py:110: in _assert_no_pii assert "phone" not in obj, f"phone leaked in payload: keys={list(obj.keys())}" E AssertionError: phone leaked in payload: keys=['id', 'user_id', 'name', 'phone', 'category', 'skills', 'experience_years', 'daily_wage', 'hourly_wage', 'languages', 'city', 'bio', 'profile_pic', 'cover_pic', 'available', 'rating', 'jobs_completed', 'review_count', 'verified', 'status', 'last_active', 'distance_km', 'created_at'] E assert 'phone' not in {'id': '471b0cc4-b3ed-4592-8aa7-3cb90387d25e', 'user_id': None, 'name': 'Naveen I.', 'phone': '+919871070189', ...}
